description: MDriver curated open-source case library — entries the agent can reference, link to users, or have them git-clone for local RAG. URLs verified as of update date.
license_note: MDriver bundles a curated subset of LAMMPS examples + potentials under cases/lammps-official/ (GPL-2.0). Other entries are URL indices only — clone locally to use; respect upstream licenses.

local_bundles.name: LAMMPS Official Examples (Bundled Subset)
contents: examples/reaxff   — ReaxFF reactive MD: RDX, HNS, water, AB, NaCl, polyethylene crack, viscosity, etc.
examples/friction — frictional sliding between LJ walls
potentials/       — 260+ force-field files: EAM, MEAM, Tersoff, AIREBO, full ReaxFF set (ffield.reax.*), SNAP, etc.
local_bundles.usage: Agent should `list_dir cases/lammps-official/examples/<topic>` and `read_file` the in.* / data.* / log.* directly — zero network needed.

entries.name: LAMMPS Official Examples (FULL upstream, optional)
entries.scope: 100+ canonical input scripts: LJ fluid, NEMD, polymers, reax, peri, granular, USER-* packages

entries.name: LAMMPS Official Potentials Archive
entries.license: GPL-2.0 (collection); individual files have own citations
entries.scope: 200+ ready-to-use potential files: EAM, MEAM, Tersoff, AIREBO, ReaxFF (CHO/CHON/CHONS), SNAP, ML-IAP

entries.name: LAMMPS Tutorials (community portal)
entries.scope: Step-by-step LJ fluid, carbon nanotube fracture, water-silica, polymer melt; includes lab handouts

entries.name: Moltemplate — Molecule Builder & Examples
entries.scope: Builds polymers, ionic liquids, surfaces; 50+ OPLSAA/AMBER/DREIDING/TraPPE/COMPASS examples that auto-emit LAMMPS data+input

entries.name: OpenKIM Interatomic Models
entries.scope: 3000+ vetted potentials, queryable via KIM API (pair_style kim)

entries.name: NIST Interatomic Potentials Repository
entries.scope: Hand-curated potentials with property benchmarks; covers EAM, MEAM, ReaxFF, BOP

entries.name: potentials (LAMMPS) — NIST Python client
entries.scope: Python client for the NIST repo above; clean way to programmatically pull potentials

entries.name: EMC — Enhanced Monte Carlo polymer builder
entries.scope: Robust polymer / liquid / mixture packer; ships ~50 templated systems and exports LAMMPS data+input

entries.name: PyLAT — Python LAMMPS Analysis Toolkit
entries.scope: Post-process LAMMPS trajectories: MSD, viscosity (Green-Kubo), RDF, ion conductivity; ideal companion for the agent's post-processing step

entries.name: atomman — LAMMPS + DFT structure manipulator
entries.scope: Builds/reads LAMMPS data files, crystal defects, dislocation cores; integrates with NIST potentials client

entries.name: OVITO Python Script Gallery
entries.scope: Reference scripts for dump-file analysis: common-neighbor analysis, Wigner-Seitz defect, cluster analysis; pair well with NGL preview

entries.name: ReaxFF analysis tools (reaxff-tools, reaxff-bond-analyzer)
entries.scope: Bond order parsing, species histograms, reaction network builders for ReaxFF dumps + species.out

entries.name: LAMMPS Documentation Source (RST + ReaxFF chapters)
entries.scope: Full RST docs for every command — extremely useful for agent RAG; smaller than examples/
